revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-235

The average power supplied to the antenna transmission line by a radio transmitter during one radio frequency cycle under conditions of no modulation.

Reference: C.C.I.R. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
